text.title: Design Review PR Checklist Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals to apply / skip / route-elsewhere. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: PR touches UI files (components, styles, routes)?

conclusion.verdict: n/a — not a UI PR; this methodology does not apply

branch.question: design system present + handoff bundle linked?
required reviewer is designer or design-engineer?

conclusion.verdict: block PR until designer is assigned
run the 10-item checklist with evidence per item

text.example: ui_touched=true -> system_present=true -> designer_reviewer=true -> run 10-item checklist (rule ten-item-checklist).
